{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = Julian Derrimore
| introduced = lh-01-the-captain
}}

== The Captain ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[Julian Derrimore]] is an interplanetary journalist.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c6">''The Captain'', chapter 6</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|“Julian Derrimore,” the Karoshan commander read. “Journalist specializing in interplanetary journalism.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c6" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:The Captain]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon characters]]
